lineup_source: France vs Senegal, Group I, 16 June 2026

players.name: Édouard Mendy
players.note: Born in Montivilliers, France, to a Bissau-Guinean father and a Senegalese mother.

players.name: Krépin Diatta
players.note: Born in Dakar, Senegal (homegrown; parents not documented but Senegalese).

players.name: Kalidou Koulibaly
players.note: Born in Saint-Dié-des-Vosges, France, to Senegalese parents.

players.name: Moussa Niakhaté
players.note: Born in Roubaix, France; Senegalese by descent (individual parents not specified).

players.name: El Hadji Malick Diouf
players.note: Born in Diouloulou, Senegal (homegrown; parents not documented but Senegalese).

players.name: Lamine Camara
players.note: Born in Dakar, Senegal (homegrown; parents not documented but Senegalese).

players.name: Pape Gueye
players.note: Born in Montreuil, France; Senegalese by descent (individual parents not specified).

players.name: Ismaïla Sarr
players.note: Born in Saint-Louis, Senegal; mother is French ('My mother is from France').

players.name: Habib Diarra
players.note: Born in Guédiawaye, Senegal; moved to France young. Parents not documented.

players.name: Sadio Mané
players.note: Born in Bambali, Senegal, to Guinean parents.

players.name: Nicolas Jackson
players.note: Gambian father and Senegalese mother; birthplace disputed (Banjul, Gambia per several sources; Djibonker, Senegal per club profiles).
